abstracts.abstract: Amends the apportionment and allocation of income for purposes of taxation relating to the taxation of banks.

bill.title: AN ACT RELATING TO TAXATION -- TAXATION OF BANKS

posted_text:
💰 RI H8611 — Amends the apportionment and allocation of income for purposes of taxation relating to the taxation of banks.

This bill modifies how Rhode Island taxes banks, specifically by changing the way income is allocated for tax purposes. The amendment impacts banks operating within the state, clarifying the rules for calculating their tax liabilities.

June 23, 2026: Signed by Governor.

🔗 Read the full bill: https://webserver.rilegislature.gov/BillText26/HouseText26/H8611.htm

#Taxation #RhodeIsland #Legislation #StateLegislature #CivicTech
